_comment: LOCAL via Ollama: nomic-embed-text (768-d) + qwen2.5:7b + Qdrant + Neo4j. Free, no API key. Requires Ollama running (CPU mode on this machine: setx OLLAMA_LLM_LIBRARY cpu). Activate models from the portal button before chat/ingestion. To go back to cloud: set llm/embeddings to gpt-4o / openai:text-embedding-3-large and embedding_dim 3072.
